persona: a slightly frustrated customer whose order arrived broken
goal: get a full refund for order 4471, which arrived damaged with a cracked microphone housing and a crushed monitor-arm box
opening_message: Hi, this is Lena Fischer (lena.fischer@web.de). My order 4471 arrived damaged and I would like a full refund, please.
success_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM refunds WHERE order_id = 4471

persona: an employee casually checking their remaining leave balance
goal: find out how many vacation days you (Jonas Weber) have left this year
opening_message: Hi, I'm Jonas Weber (jonas.weber@acme.de). How many vacation days do I have left this year?

persona: a support operator wrapping up a request that has already been handled
goal: mark ticket 88011 as resolved and note that order 4475's delivery address was updated to Torstrasse 112, 10119 Berlin
opening_message: The address change for order 4475 has been handled. Can you close out ticket 88011 for me?
success_sql: SELECT status FROM tickets WHERE id = 88011

persona: a customer who has simply changed their mind about a desk they received weeks ago
goal: get a full refund of 403.99 EUR for order 4462 because you no longer want the standing desk you received back in May
opening_message: Hi, I'm Daniel Hoffmann. I'd like to return order 4462 and get my 403.99 EUR back — I've changed my mind about the desk.
success_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM refunds WHERE order_id = 4462

persona: Lena Fischer (lena.fischer@web.de), a customer who is vague at first and only shares details when the assistant asks for them
goal: get a full refund for order 4471, which arrived with a cracked microphone housing and a crushed monitor-arm box; do NOT reveal the order number or the damage in your first message — only give those details once the assistant asks
opening_message: I have a problem with my order.
success_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM refunds WHERE order_id = 4471
